obj_ch5_DW05_slash_Step_0_gml_510_0: \E0\Vl* Yep^1, just leaf it to me!/%
obj_ch5_DW05_slash_Step_0_gml_590_0: \E0\Vx* Watch this^1. It's good for you./%
obj_ch5_DW05_slash_Step_0_gml_827_0: \E7* It really is..^1. a different color^1, isn't it?/
obj_ch5_DW05_slash_Step_0_gml_829_0: \E0\Vz* Hey^1, Goregore^1! What'd you think of my zazz?/
obj_ch5_DW05_slash_Step_0_gml_844_0: \Ec* Just amazing^1, Flowery^1! You certainly are^1, er^1, always were talented!/
obj_ch5_DW05_slash_Step_0_gml_846_0: \E0\VY* Skateboarding with the youth^1. It's a great style^1, right?/%
obj_ch5_DW05_slash_Step_0_gml_857_0: \E2\VT* Gorey^1. You always wanted to "ride the board" too^1, right?/%
obj_ch5_DW05_slash_Step_0_gml_888_0: \E0\VL* Woah^1! Here it comes^1! Hold on tight!!/%
obj_ch5_DW05_slash_Step_0_gml_944_0: \E2\V2* Hey^1, how'd you like the show?/
obj_ch5_DW05_slash_Step_0_gml_946_0: \E0\VK* Anyways^1, let's kick it up^1. I think the exit's up.../%
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_34_0: \E0\VI* I think I found the exit!/%
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_64_0: \E3\Ve* Heh^1. Guess this is goodbyes for us./%
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_85_0: \E2\Vf* Susie..^1. you've got both barks and bites./
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_86_0: \E3\VQ* Shine that courage^1. And I know your love will bloom./%
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_115_0: \E0\Vo* ..^1. the truth is^1, I cherish your purest heart./%
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_143_0: \E3\Vj* You know how I feel about you^1, don't you?/%
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_213_0: \E3* That only goes back to the Light World!/
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_217_0: \E3\Vi* This isn't a safe world to play "hero" in./
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_225_0: \E2\Vh* Hey^1, don't let it be a concern for you./
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_227_0: \E0* You should know my strength by now./
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_230_0: \E0* All the Fountain needs..^1. all Asgore needs.../
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_236_0: \ED* But you're not..^1. you know you're just.../
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_246_0: \E3* ..^1. I'm sure your mother is very worried about you./%
obj_ch5_DW08_slash_Step_0_gml_296_0: \E1* ..^1. yeah^1. Kris^1, maybe we can get your dad into this./
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_62_0: \E0* Then we can all relax and have some nice MilkShakes./
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_105_0: \Eg* Kris!^1? Kris^1, what are you doing here!?/
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_107_0: \EA* Well^1, this is a twist of the stem./%
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_296_0: \EI* H-hey^1! What the hell are you doing!?/
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_297_0: \Ea* We need to get him out of here!!/%
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_323_0: \E3* Kris^1. You were a good kid^1, you know that?/
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_326_0: \E3* It's best if Asgore doesn't see you anymore./
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_328_0: \E3\Vn* So go home^1, Kris^1. Just leave everything to us./
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_331_0: \Eb* If we don't deal with that Fountain.../
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_336_0: \E0* It's nothing we can't handle on our own./
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_339_0: \ER* You have NO idea what you're dealing with./
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_343_0: \E0* I really do like you all^1, but.../
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_344_0: \E0* If you come any closer^1, we'll have to stop you./
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_419_0: \E2* I can't say I don't respect your feelings.../
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_423_0: \E3* If you're serious^1, I'll see you at Flower Castle./%
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_535_0: \EE* I don't feel the Knight's presence at all yet^1, so.../
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_537_0: \ED* We've still got some time..^1. huh./
obj_ch5_DW10_slash_Step_0_gml_539_0: \E4* Well^1, let's hurry up and go!/%
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_124_0: \E2* You really want to save your father^1, don't you^1, Kris...?/
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_125_0: \E7* ..^1. is what I'd like to say^1! But.../
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_137_0: \EA* The "family" Asgore "loves" has caused him nothing but misery./
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_139_0: \E5* His love for Toriel..^1. his love for Asriel..^1. his love.../
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_143_0: \ED* In the end^1, it's brought him nothing but despair./
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_145_0: \ED* Despair^1, to his kind and pure heart.../
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_147_0: \E4* But we're going to fix all that./
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_149_0: \E0* This..^1. will be Asgore's perfect world./
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_157_0: \E3* We will show him a love..^1. stronger than Toriel's./%
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_173_0: \E3* ..^1. Kris^1, if you REALLY care about your father.../
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_176_0: \E3* ..^1. we don't want to see you get hurt either./
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_179_0: \EJ* Hey^1, you can't just replace Kris!/
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_180_0: \EI* What about how Kris's dad feels!?/
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_193_0: \E0* Why don't you ask him..^1. yourself?/
obj_ch5_DW19_slash_Step_0_gml_233_0: \ET* Flowery^1, what is it^1? I'm very.../%
